title: There You Are!
writer: Tay Garnett, F. Hugh Herbert, Ralph Spence
actors: Conrad Nagel, Edith Roberts, George Fawcett
plot: "Good-natured but dull hero working in office loves employer's daughter. Through accident he captures bandit, becoming a hero and girl promises to marry him. There is a merry mix-up before the act is accomplished." - Motion Pictur...
